sample:
The Best Price Guarantee Program does not apply to:
(i) properties located in Mainland China, Macau, Hong Kong, and Taiwan;
(ii) Iberostar Beachfront Resorts; and
(iii) Ruby Hotels, temporarily not participating in the Program until October 2026.
